meta.subject: Integrated Science
meta.source: NCDC Primary Six Curriculum Set One, Integrated Science Syllabus

themes.name: Diversity of Living Things and Anatomy

topics.title: Classification of Living Things
subTopics: Classification of animals: Vertebrates (mammals, birds, reptiles, amphibians, fish) vs Invertebrates (arthropods, worms, molluscs)
Classification of plants: Flowering plants (monocots vs dicots) vs Non-flowering plants (ferns, mosses, conifers, fungi)
Characteristics and adaptations of living organisms

topics.title: Sound Energy and the Human Ear
subTopics: Production of sound by vibration and transmission through solids, liquids, and gases
Pitch, volume, frequency, and echo reflection
Structure and working of the human ear (outer ear, eardrum, middle ear ossicles, inner ear cochlea)
Care of the human ear and deafness prevention

topics.title: The Human Circulatory System
subTopics: Structure and working of the human heart (4 chambers, valves, pumping mechanism)
Blood vessels: comparing arteries, veins, and capillaries
Components and functions of blood (plasma, red blood cells, white blood cells, platelets)
Blood circulation pathway and circulatory system disorders (hypertension, anaemia, malaria impact)

topics.title: The Human Respiratory System
subTopics: Organs of breathing: nose, trachea, bronchi, lungs, alveoli, and diaphragm
Mechanism of inhalation and exhalation (gas exchange in alveoli)
Respiratory diseases and hygiene (tuberculosis TB, pneumonia, asthma, dangers of tobacco smoking)

topics.title: Cattle and Poultry Keeping
subTopics: Breeds of cattle (local/indigenous vs exotic dairy and beef breeds) and management systems
Poultry keeping: types of chickens, housing (deep litter vs battery cage), feeding, and egg production
Livestock parasites and common diseases (ticks, tsetse flies, East Coast Fever, Newcastle disease, coccidiosis)
